originalTitle: MOBA for Reinforcement Learning, Dev Day #4
title: Implementing 15 Hero Abilities and Refactoring Core Systems for RL MOBA
summary: Worked on implementing 15 hero abilities for a miniature MOBA environment, including stuns, slows, teleports, and heals. Refactored entity system from PID-based to pointer-based for performance, added HUD with cooldown display, and debugged skill targeting issues. Environment now at ~850 lines of Cython.
